name: Junk pirates / ASP / PACK (Release)
author: mendonca
description: Junk Pirates, PACK and ASP Syndicate come together, at long last. 0.98a-RC8 compatibility pass with Nexerelin faction setup, save-load recovery, relation cleanup, LunaLib settings, Starship Legends support, first-pass ship balance, and updated dependency metadata. Requires LazyLib and GraphicsLib.
